description_long: This is a modern military fighter jet with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a sharply pointed nose cone. The aircraft features a single-seat, enclosed cockpit with a dark, tinted canopy positioned at the front of the fuselage. Its wings are low-mounted and swept back, equipped with multiple hardpoints carrying missiles and external fuel tanks. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The jet is finished in a light gray color scheme with subtle panel lines and surface details, and the landing gear appears to be retracted, indicating a streamlined profile for flight.
description: A sleek, gray modern fighter jet with swept-back low wings, a single vertical tail, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. The jet is armed with missiles and external tanks under its wings.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the swept-back wings, single vertical stabilizer, and external stores under the wings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical wing-mounted armaments.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring the features of view 0 with visible external stores and tail structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin horizontal stabilizers, single vertical stabilizer, and the jet's streamlined fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with multiple hardpoints and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine with intake located beneath the fuselage, exhaust at the rear.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear; gear is not visible in the images, indicating retracted position.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat, enclosed cockpit with a dark, bubble canopy.
